title: BeyondTrust Privileged Session Duration Beyond Policy Threshold
app: BeyondTrust integrations feeding Splunk PAM index
spl:
index=pam sourcetype="beyondtrust:session" earliest=-24h
| eval dur_min=coalesce(duration_min, round(duration_sec/60,1), round((SessionDurationSeconds)/60,1))
| eval user=coalesce(user, UserName, admin_user, "")
| eval target=coalesce(target_host, TargetHost, dest, "")
| where isnotnull(dur_min) AND dur_min>120
| stats max(dur_min) as max_min avg(dur_min) as avg_min by user, target
| sort -max_min
description: Sessions that remain open for hours increase the window for credential theft, lateral movement, and unrecorded activity if recording fails mid-session.
value: Automates a control frequently checked only during audits, surfacing outliers before they appear in quarterly PAM reports.
implementation: Confirm which duration field your BeyondTrust parser provides; some feeds require computing `strptime` deltas between session start and end events. Set thresholds per asset class (120 minutes default). Join with change tickets for expected long maintenance.
visualization: Table (user × target × max duration), histogram of session lengths, timeline.

references.title: BeyondTrust Password Safe / Cloud Dashboard for Splunk

dataModelAcceleration: Not applicable: this use case is not built on a CIM data model. Rely on the search in Step 2 against your raw directory, IdP, PAM, or device feeds.
knownFalsePositives: Planned long maintenance, database restores, and vendor-led sessions that exceed the default minutes but are on the change calendar — join alerts with ITSM and PAM change records.
grandmaExplanation: We call out when a remote admin session drags on far longer than policy allows so you can end risky marathon access before it becomes a bigger incident.
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
• Install and configure: BeyondTrust integrations feeding Splunk PAM index.
• Data sources: `sourcetype=beyondtrust:session` with duration or start/end timestamps.

Step 1 — Configure data collection
Confirm which duration field your BeyondTrust parser provides; some feeds require computing `strptime` deltas between session start and end events. Set thresholds per asset class (120 minutes default). Join with change tickets for expected long maintenance.

Step 2 — Create the search and alert

```spl
index=pam sourcetype="beyondtrust:session" earliest=-24h
| eval dur_min=coalesce(duration_min, round(duration_sec/60,1), round((SessionDurationSeconds)/60,1))
| eval user=coalesce(user, UserName, admin_user, "")
| eval target=coalesce(target_host, TargetHost, dest, "")
| where isnotnull(dur_min) AND dur_min>120
| stats max(dur_min) as max_min avg(dur_min) as avg_min by user, target
| sort -max_min
```

Step 3 — Validate
Compare with BeyondTrust session start/end and duration fields in the vendor console for the same session IDs and time range.

Step 4 — Operationalize
Add to a dashboard or alert; document the owner. Table (user × target × max duration), histogram of session lengths, timeline.
